2391790.name: Stand Your Ground: Self Defense
2391790.description:
STAND YOUR GROUND

STAND YOUR GROUND is an immersive tactical FPS game where you must defend yourself from armed attackers. Play as an American Civilian, who is well within their right to legally own and use a firearm for self-defense, and fight your way out of situations inspired by actual events - or let the attackers take over. The choice is yours.


True Immersion

Experience unmatched immersion through engaging gameplay systems, photorealistic graphics, responsive animations, and deliberate sound & music design. Experience a first-person shooter like never before, powered by the latest Unreal Engine 5, using new technology such as Lumen and Nanite to bring you the closest thing to a true-to-life experience.


Realism in Firearm Functionality

Made by the creator of the TrueRealism Weapon Mechanics - STAND YOUR GROUND provides the most realistic weapon-handling system ever seen in a video game. Gain unmatched control over your firearm with a fleshed-out input scheme. You are free to operate your weapon however you like, and are rewarded for operating your firearm skillfully. There are many different ways to load and unload your weapon - choose whichever will get your firearm ready to fire quickest.


Unprecedented Control

STAND YOUR GROUND brings robust options and settings in every area, from Gameplay, Controls, Graphics, Sound, and more. STAND YOUR GROUND includes all the essential settings you can expect from a quality title to tune the experience just how you like it.


Short, Intense, Single-player Experience

STAND YOUR GROUND provides a short, yet intense and engaging game loop that will keep you on the edge of your seat every second. This experience aims to educate users on how to correctly use their firearms, and expose the world to the harsh reality of certain crimes that happen more often than we would like them to.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
